chat.welcome: Namaste! I am your Gita Gyan spiritual mentor. Ask me anything about life, emotions, or wisdom from the Bhagavad Gita.
chat.voiceNotSupported: Voice recognition not supported in this browser. Try Chrome or Edge.
chat.voiceHttpsRequired: Voice requires HTTPS. Please use HTTPS or localhost.
chat.micDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone in browser settings.
chat.noSpeech: No speech detected. Please try again.
chat.voiceFailed: Voice recognition failed. Please try again.
chat.ttsNotSupported: Text-to-speech not supported in this browser
chat.ttsFailed: Voice playback failed. Please try again.
chat.connectionError: Failed to connect. Please try again.
chat.genericError: I apologize, something went wrong. Please try again. The divine light is always with you.
